description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a collared shirt layered under a zip-up sweater and a pair of fitted jeans. The figure's arms are extended outward, parallel to the ground, and the hands are relaxed with fingers slightly apart. The facial expression is neutral, and the hair is short and neatly styled. The shoes are low-profile and suitable for everyday walking. The clothing fits well and is typical for a city environment, providing both comfort and practicality. The overall build is average, and the figure appears healthy and proportionate.
description: An adult male in casual city clothing with arms extended, wearing a collared shirt, sweater, jeans, and low-profile shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, collared shirt under a sweater, arms extended, and full front of jeans and shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side seam of the sweater and jeans, and the shoe's side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, sweater, jeans, and both arms extended backward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, sweater, jeans, and the right shoe from the side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual collared shirt layered under a zip-up sweater and fitted jeans
